creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
Thanks for the submission.

If you would like to yield the maintainership to someone else, please submit a patch that resets the MAINTAINER to ports@freebsd.org. That way the port is basically marked as needing a maintainer and someone might step up.

Also, please consider setting the port as DEPRECATED with an EXPIRATION_DATE, rather than immediately removing, if you think the upstream is unresponsive. That way users of the port might decide to take over. More info here:

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/book.html#dads-deprecated
